_comment: NSE UDiFF F&O bhavcopy mapping (the standard layout since 2024-07). ALWAYS probe a real file first: uv run python scripts/bhav_import.py --probe <file>. Index options = FinInstrmTp 'IDO', index futures = 'IDF'. SENSEX trades on BSE, NOT in this NSE file — make a separate mapping (source_tag BSEBHAV) for BSE bhavcopy and probe it before trusting columns.
